idea_summary: Baseline 7-kernel fused MoE pipeline from tutorial (00_baseline.co)
Fuse scatter into WGMMA, count+build, quant+sort+gather to reduce 7 kernels to 4
Apply all tutorial optimizations: parallel.async, grid swap, L2 persistence, QSG
Replace opt_copy (scalar 32-bit loads) with cp.async tiled_copy using SM80_CP_AS
Add __restrict__ to all kernel pointer params and --use_fast_math. +1.3% vs iter
Remove --maxrregcount=224 to allow more registers. Slightly worse, register cap
Double-buffer K-loop pipelining (sA+sB x2). Regressed 7.2% due to doubled shared
Added #pragma unroll to warp loops, fragment init, and scatter loops. No effect
Reduced maxrregcount from 224 to 128 for higher occupancy. Severe regression (-1
Changed cp.async from CACHEALWAYS to CACHEGLOBAL for LHS loads — bypass L1 for s
Changed L2 persistence from LHS to scatter output. Regressed 10% — LHS benefits
Preloaded scale_b into registers + CACHEGLOBAL. Severe regression (-24%) from re
Added -Xptxas -dlcm=cg for all loads. No change — CACHEGLOBAL already explicit o
Double-buffer only RHS TMA sB 16KB keeping LHS single-buffered. Total shared 40K
